summary: Iteration 6 testing — 3 new editorial pages (/a-propos, /methodologie, /manifeste) + shared Footer + sitemap.xml. Backend: 19/19 pytest passed (sitemap exposes 3 new URLs with FR/EN/FA + x-default hreflang). Frontend: all required data-testids present, footer renders on Home/Articles/Studies/About/Methodology/Manifesto, language switch (FR/EN/FA) updates titles, dir=rtl applied on FA, header contains NO links to the 3 new pages. Manifesto has italic lede + Maneli Mirkhan signature + OpinionNewsArticle+Person JSON-LD + NO photo. Methodology section 5 'Sources interdites et sources attribuées' present with MEK/NCRI/Iran International banned and Tasnim/Fars attributed; no /corrections stub. About has AboutPage JSON-LD. Regression: editorial policy tests from iteration_5 still 17/17 pass. No critical issues found.

issues: Pre-existing hydration warning: <a> nested inside <a> (brief-pdf-... link is inside the brief-card LinkWithRef wrapper). Not introduced by this iteration but worth fixing — invalid HTML.

Console warnings: cabinet-grotesk font fails to decode (OTS parsing error on https://fonts.cdnfonts.com/css/cabinet-grotesk). Cosmetic only — fallback fonts kick in. Consider self-hosting or replacing the source.

action_items: (Optional, pre-existing) Fix nested <a> hydration warning in Studies.js — the brief-pdf <a> should not be inside the LinkWithRef brief-card.
(Optional) Replace or self-host the cabinet-grotesk font to remove OTS decoding warnings.
critical_code_review_comments: EditorialPage.js renders the Footer inside itself AND parent routes do not need to wrap separately — confirmed no double-footer on /a-propos, /methodologie, /manifeste.
JSON-LD for Manifesto correctly uses OpinionNewsArticle + Person 'Maneli Mirkhan' with affiliation Organization Iran Observatory.
Sitemap canonical hardcoded to https://iranobservatory.org regardless of FRONTEND_URL when 'preview' in URL — appropriate for SEO.
test_credentials: Not exercised this iteration — read-only public pages.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Editorial pages and shared Footer fully validated. Iteration 5 editorial policy regression (17 tests) continues to pass. If new editorial routes are added, extend /app/backend/tests/test_editorial_pages.py with the new path and matching hreflang assertions. Pre-existing Studies.js nested-<a> hydration warning should be fixed by main agent.
